results.title: NACA 4412 Airfoil Design and Analysis
results.snippet: This document discusses the design, fabrication, and experimental results of the NACA 4412 airfoil. CFD simulations were performed using ANSYS software to model the airfoil and aircraft wing geometry. results.title: Effect of blade profile on the external/internal geometry of a small ...
results.snippet: Effect of blade profile (airfoil) on the distribution of the chord and twist of a small wind turbine blade was studied. NACA4412 and SG6043 were selected for the design of solid/hollow blades and the two optimization procedures were performed.

results.snippet: The wind turbine obtains electricity from wind energy, which is a renewable energy source. One of the elements affecting the yield of wind turbines is aerodynamic properties of airfoils.
